video.description: Identifier for this opening (used as the output subfolder under renders/ and the lookup folder under comps/).

orientations.description: Which aspect ratios to render. Landscape = 1920x1080, Portrait = 1080x1920.

value.description: Big number on screen, e.g. "$420" or "$1,200".

label.description: Small uppercase label above the value.

subtitle.description: Optional context line, e.g. "Last sold 30d" or "PSA 10 comp".

holdSeconds.description: How long the title sits on-screen between the in/out animation.

slug.description: Optional override for the filename slug. Defaults to the card index + value.

comp_image.description: Optional filename inside comps/<video>/ for the eBay sold screenshot. If omitted, the script auto-looks for NN.png/.jpg/.jpeg/.webp where NN is the 1-based card index zero-padded to two digits (01, 02, ...).
